svg.title: Overall architecture — Android, Web, and shared library
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing Android app and Web app both depending on the shared KMP library, each injecting their own LlmEngine and CedictSource implementations

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Android UI layer do?')
sendPrompt('Where does the Qwen model live on Android?')
sendPrompt('What does the Web UI layer do?')
sendPrompt('Which cloud LLM does the web use?')

svg.text: all internal — caller never sees these
